title: Hell's Survivor
body:
[NOTE:THIS MOD IS MY FIRST MOD]

This Mod aims to add Horror Surrounding Nuclear Bombs.
The main focus of the mod is tied to the horrors of the Nuclear Bomb dropped on Hiroshima in 1945.

I've found the documentaries about it terrifying and thought it might suit a horror mod.

The Mod is still in early development, so many aspects may change, and I'll try making it scarier!

**Why Should You Get This**❓

Simply for a spook or fun with Nuclear Bombs, new items, new mobs and new structures!

I wish you a great day and hopefully a fun experience in-game, :) Have Fun.

**Contacting about any Bugs / Suggestions🔧**

The Following Link will lead you to a Discord Server, if you don't want to join, that's alright, but there may not be a different way to contact me :|
[Discord](https://discord.com/channels/980391020602736693/1325451207296421888)

**_IF YOUR SUGGESTION IS TO PORT IT, THEN NOTE THAT I WILL NOT RESPOND! FOR NOW IT IS ONLY NEOFORGE, BUT I'D LIKE TO PORT IT IN THE FUTURE :)_**

You can contact me in The RyDaCol Public Discord at the "Help For My Mods"!

**Consequences of Download / Potential Risk⚠️**

Note that the Nuclear Bombs and also Hell's Survivor (Monster), do destroy stuff and there may even be more destructive actions in the future.

THE MOD HAS A KNOWN BUG, THAT FREEZES SERVER SIDE UPON FIRST JOIN OF A WORLD! IF YOU ENCOUNTER THIS SCENARIO JUST SAVE, BUT IF THE SAVE DOESN'T LOAD, THEN FORCE CLOSE MINECRAFT AND UPON NEXT JOIN EVERYTHING SHOULD WORK!! :) [This only applies for versions pre-1.1 or maybe even earlier, but definitely doesn't happen in the newer versions, no worries!]

**DO NOT USE THIS ON EXISTING WORLDS!**

**What It Adds🧪**

This Mod adds a few thing that are all being added to its wiki (Wiki is Currently Gone)

Among those things we have a new dimension to represent a post nuclear horror world, new enemies including the man himself! Hell's Survivor.

Currently, there are about four different nukes that can be played around with and more are planned.

The mod also adds a few blocks, shelters / bunkers, outposts, camps, entities for immersion and more.

**Pixilart Album🖼️**
[https://www.pixilart.com/rydacolyt/albums/hell-s-survivor-376488](https://www.pixilart.com/rydacolyt/albums/hell-s-survivor-376488)
